title: PPIP - Dialog after Onboarding - UI
scenario: After completing onboarding and tapping "Continue as Guest", verify that the PPIP dialog appears with "Help us improve your experience" message and options to "Don't Share" or "Share Data".
expected: A PPIP (Product Performance Improvement Program) dialog should appear with the title "Help us improve your experience." The dialog explains that HP may collect basic device and app information (model, serial number, software version, feature usage) to improve performance and support. It clarifies that no personal information is collected or shared with third parties, and preferences can be changed anytime in Settings. The dialog provides two options: "Don't Share" and "Share Data".
